title: Add missing test fixture for payment processor
description: The payment processor test suite was missing a fixture for the refund scenario, causing test_process_refund to be silently skipped.
diff:
diff --git a/tests/conftest.py b/tests/conftest.py
index 9a0b1c2..d3e4f5a 100644
--- a/tests/conftest.py
+++ b/tests/conftest.py
@@ -25,6 +25,18 @@ def sample_payment():
     }
 
 
+@pytest.fixture
+def sample_refund():
+    """Fixture for refund processing tests."""
+    return {
+        "transaction_id": "txn_test_refund_001",
+        "original_amount": 4999,
+        "refund_amount": 4999,
+        "currency": "USD",
+        "reason": "customer_request",
+    }
+
+
 @pytest.fixture
 def mock_gateway(mocker):
     return mocker.patch("payments.gateway.process")
comments: oscar: This explains why we had zero refund test coverage. Approve.
author: pat
